---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused runtime or integration capability
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## User problem

Describe the use case and why the current runtime is insufficient.

## Proposed capability

Define behavior, configuration, and acceptance criteria.

## Permission and privacy impact

Explain tool permissions, local data, model/provider, network, and failure boundaries.

## Verification

List unit, integration, and manual checks required.
